response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX/embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex distributed systems
Active open-source contributor with deep tooling and infrastructure expertise
concerns: No C or embedded firmware development experience as required
Zero evidence of networking security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.)
No Japanese language proficiency — a mandatory requirement
